title: Kingdom Evolution
description: Millénaire / more armors / more weapons / new textures / simplification mods
body:
![kingdom evolution main sign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2105ab2e36377a47e46deb0aaf80a92eda8f1f04.png)

Modpack is based on **Millénaire**.

Several mods have been added to simplify the game, provide variety and get closer to the feel of new versions of Minecraft. 

![medieval-style dividing line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/366776b76cfdb2cc21fdae37dfee3c6b0ae58a20.png)

The modpack adds:

- Settlements that can be turned into a city.

- Own quest branch with three different paths

- Lots of weapons and armor

- New tools to accelerate resource extraction

- Mods and textures for the full feeling of being on a new version of Minecraft

- Small mods to simplify the usual game

![medieval-style dividing line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/366776b76cfdb2cc21fdae37dfee3c6b0ae58a20.png)

**Here's what you can do on the modpack:**


- Find a settlement that suits your taste and help them become a huge city.

- Explore the world to find the perfect place to build your kingdom.

- Complete the tasks offered by the mod and discover all the secrets of the world.

- Create different weapons and armor. Find something you like and try it out in battle.

![medieval-style dividing line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/366776b76cfdb2cc21fdae37dfee3c6b0ae58a20.png)
